message:
Extend parser, lowering pipeline, arena, and multi-engine harness for new statement types

Parser (parser.rs, +1625 lines): add statement_kind_label() coverage
for all 12 new statement variants (block, if, for, while, do_while,
return, throw, try_catch, switch, break, continue, function_declaration).
Qualify all control-flow parse dispatch calls with self:: to disambiguate
module-local functions. Reformat span construction for consistency.
Expand split_var_declarator_segments() with saturating arithmetic for
delimiter depth tracking and a dedicated push_var_declarator_segment
helper. Massive new parser body (~1130 lines) covering expression
parsing for binary, unary, assignment, conditional, call, member access,
this, array/object literals, arrow functions, and template literals.

Lowering pipeline (lowering_pipeline.rs): handle all 12 new statement
types in validate_ir0_static_semantics() (pass-through, semantic
analysis handled recursively) and lower_ir0_to_ir1() (emit
LoadLiteral::Undefined placeholder pending runtime execution pipeline).
Handle 10 new expression types in lower_expression_to_ir1() with the
same Undefined placeholder strategy.

Parser arena (parser_arena.rs): add UnsupportedStatement and
UnsupportedExpression error variants to ArenaError with Display impls.
Return proper errors for all 12 new statement types and 10 new
expression types instead of panicking. Add statement_kind_name() and
expression_kind_name() helpers.

Multi-engine harness (parser_multi_engine_harness.rs):
estimate_statement_allocation_count() gains recursive handlers for all
12 new statement types, correctly computing allocation estimates for
nested blocks, conditionals, loops, try/catch/finally, switch/case,
and function declarations with parameter lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
